name: Kobold Scout Pack
description: A group of wary kobold scouts patrolling the mine tunnels!
ambient_description: Kobold scouts screech in alarm, readying slings and short swords. Their glowing eyes gleam in the torchlight.
victory_description: The kobolds flee deeper into the mine, leaving behind scattered coins and equipment.
defeat_description: The kobolds drive you back with sling stones and wild slashes. You retreat to regroup.
